hero.title: Institutional-Grade
hero.description: Orion Trade Hub protects digital assets using enterprise-grade encryption, continuous threat monitoring, multi-layer account protection, and resilient infrastructure designed for modern financial markets.

steps.title: Account Verification
steps.text: Every new account is verified before full platform access is granted.

steps.title: Multi-Layer Protection
steps.text: Passwords, two-factor authentication, and encrypted sessions secure every login.

steps.title: Continuous Monitoring
steps.text: Advanced systems monitor suspicious activity 24 hours a day.

steps.title: Cold Asset Storage
steps.text: Most customer assets remain securely stored offline for maximum protection.

protectionGrid.title: Multiple Layers of Protection
protectionGrid.description: Every Orion Trade Hub account is protected by multiple independent security systems working together.

coldStorage.title: Cold Storage
coldStorage.description: 98% of digital assets remain securely stored offline to reduce exposure to online threats.

encryption.title: 256-bit Encryption
encryption.description: Enterprise-grade encryption protects every transaction and communication.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Additional verification ensures only authorized users can access accounts.

monitoring.title: Risk Monitoring
monitoring.description: Continuous monitoring detects suspicious activity in real time.

infrastructure.title: Secure Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Hosted on resilient enterprise cloud infrastructure with multiple security layers.

fraud.title: Fraud Detection
fraud.description: Automated systems help identify abnormal account behaviour before threats escalate.

compliance.title: Built Around Security Standards
compliance.description: Orion Trade Hub follows modern security practices designed to protect customer accounts, personal information, and digital assets.

aml.title: AML Monitoring
aml.description: Continuous anti-money laundering monitoring helps identify suspicious activity.

kyc.title: KYC Verification
kyc.description: Identity verification protects both users and the integrity of the platform.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: Sensitive customer information is encrypted and securely managed.

riskControls.title: Risk Controls
riskControls.description: Automated security systems continuously assess account behaviour and potential threats.

account.question: Is my account secure?
account.answer: Yes. Every account is protected by multi-layer security including encryption, two-factor authentication, and continuous monitoring.

funds.question: Where are funds stored?
funds.answer: 98% of digital assets are stored in cold wallets, completely offline and protected from online threats.

monitoring.question: How does risk monitoring work?
monitoring.answer: Our systems analyze behavior in real time to detect and prevent suspicious activity before it becomes a threat.

institutional.question: Do you support institutional clients?
institutional.answer: Yes. Orion Trade Hub is built with institutional-grade infrastructure for high-volume and professional trading.

aboutSecurity.title: About Orion Security
aboutSecurity.intro: Security is not a feature added after development—it is the foundation upon which Orion Trade Hub is designed. Every layer of our infrastructure, every authentication process, and every operational procedure is built around protecting client assets, preserving privacy, and maintaining the highest level of platform integrity.

sections.title: 1. Security Begins With Architecture
sections.text: Orion Trade Hub is designed with security at the center of every decision rather than as an afterthought. From the moment a user creates an account until every subsequent login, deposit request, withdrawal approval, and trading activity, multiple layers of protection work together to reduce risk and safeguard sensitive information.

sections.title: 2. Enterprise Encryption
sections.text: Sensitive information deserves enterprise-grade protection. Orion Trade Hub uses encrypted communication channels designed to keep information protected whenever it travels between a visitor's device and our servers.

sections.title: 3. Continuous Monitoring
sections.text: Cybersecurity is an ongoing responsibility rather than a one-time deployment. Orion Trade Hub continuously monitors platform activity for patterns that may indicate unauthorized access attempts, suspicious login behavior, unusual account activity, or abnormal transaction requests.

sections.title: 4. Account Protection
sections.text: Every Orion Trade Hub account is protected through multiple identity verification mechanisms intended to reduce the likelihood of unauthorized access.

sections.title: 5. Infrastructure Reliability
sections.text: Reliable infrastructure plays an essential role in protecting financial platforms. Orion Trade Hub is built with stability, redundancy, and operational resilience as primary objectives.

sections.title: 6. Compliance & Responsible Operations
sections.text: Orion Trade Hub believes that responsible financial services require transparency, accountability, and clearly defined operational standards.

sections.title: 7. Protection Against Fraud
sections.text: Fraud prevention requires constant vigilance. Orion Trade Hub employs multiple verification procedures designed to identify suspicious requests before sensitive account actions are completed.

sections.title: 8. Client Privacy
sections.text: Protecting client privacy is a core responsibility. Personal information is collected only when necessary to provide services, maintain account security, and support platform operations.

sections.title: 9. Continuous Improvement
sections.text: The cybersecurity landscape evolves constantly, and so must our security strategy. Orion Trade Hub is committed to continuously reviewing, improving, and strengthening platform security.

sections.title: 10. Our Commitment
sections.text: Above every technology, process, or security tool stands a simple commitment: protecting the people who trust Orion Trade Hub with their investment journey.
